languages.original_text: "Nuncius says that he will leave a channel for enquiries about his biography and personal qualities open for you, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: "Нунциус передает, что оставит канал для запросов о его биографии и личностных качествах открытым для вас, Вольный Торговец".
"Nuncius says that he will leave a channel for enquiries about his biography and personal qualities open for you, Rogue Trader."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус передает, что оставит канал для запросов о его биографии и личностных качествах открытым для вас, Вольный Торговец".

languages.text: «Nuncius dice que dejará abierto un canal para sus preguntas acerca de su biografía y cualidades personales, Comerciante».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius says that he will leave a channel for enquiries about his biography and personal qualities open for you, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius dice que dejará abierto un canal para sus preguntas acerca de su biografía y cualidades personales, Comerciante».

languages.text: “努恩修斯表示，他愿意为您开放一个咨询频道，方便您了解他的生平和个性，行商浪人。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius says that he will leave a channel for enquiries about his biography and personal qualities open for you, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯表示，他愿意为您开放一个咨询频道，方便您了解他的生平和个性，行商浪人。”

languages.text: « Nuncius dit qu'il vous laissera un canal ouvert si vous avez d'autres questions sur sa biographie et ses qualités personnelles, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius says that he will leave a channel for enquiries about his biography and personal qualities open for you, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius dit qu'il vous laissera un canal ouvert si vous avez d'autres questions sur sa biographie et ses qualités personnelles, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: "Nuncius sagt, er lässt einen Kanal für Fragen hinsichtlich seiner Biografie und persönlichen Qualitäten für Euch offen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius says that he will leave a channel for enquiries about his biography and personal qualities open for you, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius sagt, er lässt einen Kanal für Fragen hinsichtlich seiner Biografie und persönlichen Qualitäten für Euch offen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."

languages.text: "ヌンシウスは、彼の経歴と個人的な資質に関する問い合わせのためのチャンネルを、ローグ・トレーダーであるあなたのために空けておくと言っている。"
languages.original_text: "Nuncius says that he will leave a channel for enquiries about his biography and personal qualities open for you, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: "Nuncius, geçmişi ve kişisel nitelikleri konusunda istediğiniz zaman onunla iletişime geçebileceğinizi söylüyor Hür Tacir."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius says that he will leave a channel for enquiries about his biography and personal qualities open for you, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, geçmişi ve kişisel nitelikleri konusunda istediğiniz zaman onunla iletişime geçebileceğinizi söylüyor Hür Tacir."
